notes: Specifications confirmed across two reputable AV retailers (Filmtools and Precision Camera), which agree exactly. Atomos support pages returned 403, so the authoritative manufacturer spec page could not be directly accessed. The product page at atomos.com now redirects to 'Shogun Ultra' — the Shogun Connect and Shogun Ultra appear to be the same product (ATOMSHGCO1). LANC connector is physically 2.5mm TRS but mapped to trs-3.5 as the closest available type. USB-C speed not confirmed in available sources. The two F-Type connectors are for attaching external Wi-Fi and AirGlu RF antennas, not signal routing. SDI ports are 12G-SDI (supports SD/HD/3G/6G/12G backward compatible). DC barrel voltage range is 6.2–16.8V.

ports.name: LANC
ports.note: Actually 2.5mm TRS LANC control input; trs-3.5 is the closest available connector type

ports.name: USB-C
ports.note: Labeled 'Serial' — used for data/control; speed not specified in available sources

ports.name: Antenna 2
ports.note: External RF antenna connector for AirGlu wireless SYNC
